name: SUN_Introduction_beSeated

value: <anim name='eye_ring_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>And breathe out <break size='4.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Introduction_closeEyesBreathe

name: SUN_Introduction_closeEyesBreathe
value: <anim name='eye_ring_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>And breathe out <break size='4.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Introduction_closeEyesBreathe
value: <anim name='eye_ring_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale <break size='4.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Introduction_closeEyesBreathe
value: <anim name='eye_ring_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Exhale <break size='4.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Introduction_closeEyesBreathe

name: SUN_Introduction_closeEyesBreathe
value: <anim name='eye_ring_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Exhale <break size='4.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Introduction_openEyes
value: <anim name='eye_opening' nonBlocking='true'/><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Now open your eyes and come to stand <break size='2.0'/>.</pitch></duration>

name: SUN_Introduction_standFront
value: <duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Stand at the front of your mat, with your feet parallel and hip-width apart.<break size='0.7'/>Distribute your weight evenly over your feet<break size='2.0'/>. </pitch></duration>

name: SUN_Prayer_fromIntroduction
value: <duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Bring your palms together in front of your heart.<break size='3.0'/></pitch></duration>

name: SUN_Prayer_fromIntroduction
value: <anim name='heart_center_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Take a deep breath in <break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Mountain_fromPrayer_01
value: <anim name='mountain_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Now <phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>.<break size='0.3'/> To release into Mountain Pose, let your arms down your sides, open your <phoneme ph='p aa m s'>palms</phoneme> toward the front.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Mountain_fromPrayer_01
value: <anim name='mountain_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Inhale. <break size='0.5'/>Release the tension in your shoulders <break size='2.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Mountain_fromPrayer_01
value: <anim name='mountain_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>Exhale</phoneme> <break size='3.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_UpwardSalute_fromMountain_01
value: <anim name='upward_salute_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Now let's inhale to the Upward Salute pose, sweep your arms up and over your head<break size='1.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_UpwardSalute_fromMountain_01
value: <anim name='upward_salute_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Exhale, bring your <phoneme ph='p aa m s'>palms</phoneme> to touch, or parallel your arms with <phoneme ph='p aa m s'>palms</phoneme> facing in <break size='0.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_UpwardSalute_fromMountain_01
value: <anim name='upward_salute_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale <break size='3.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_ForwardBend_fromUpwardSalute_01
value: <anim name='forward_bend_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Now to <phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme> into Forward Fold pose, release your arms down in wide arcs, hinge at the hips, and reach your hands toward ground. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_ForwardBend_fromUpwardSalute_01
value: <anim name='forward_bend_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Hold the pose, breathe in. <break size='1.0'/> Bend your knees if you have to<break size='0.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_ForwardBend_fromUpwardSalute_01
value: <anim name='forward_bend_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>And breathe out <break size='3.5'/> </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_HalfwayLift_fromForwardBend_01
value: <anim name='halfway_lift_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Now Inhale. To bring your body to Halfway Lift pose, place your hands on your shins, flatten your back<break size='0.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_HalfwayLift_fromForwardBend_01
value: <anim name='halfway_lift_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Hold here, breathe out. <break size='0.5'/> Roll your shoulder blades down your back <break size='1.0'/> </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_HalfwayLift_fromForwardBend_01
value: <anim name='halfway_lift_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>And breathe in <break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Plank_fromHalfwayLift_01
value: <anim name='plank_exhale'_comet><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>. Now to step into Plank Pose, place your palms down flat, shoulder-width apart, step your feet all the way back<break size='0.3'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Plank_fromHalfwayLift_01
value: <anim name='plank_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe in here.<break size='0.5'/> Make your body a straight line, lengthen your spine <break size='0.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Plank_fromHalfwayLift_01
value: <anim name='plank_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe out <break size='5.0'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Plank_fromHalfwayLift_01
value: <anim name='plank_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Take in a deep inhale<break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_LowPlank_fromPlank_01
value: <anim name='low_plank_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>. To <phoneme ph='l ou w r'>lower</phoneme> into Low Plank pose, bring your body down halfway to the ground, bend your elbows to 90 degrees. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_UpwardDog_fromLowPlank_01
value: <anim name='upward_dog_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>And then inhale to Upward Facing Dog, bringing your weight onto the tops of your feet, drawing your chest forward and skyward through your arms.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_UpwardDog_fromLowPlank_01
value: <anim name='upward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe out. <break size='0.5'/>Straighten your arms, tilt your tailbone to the ground to lengthen your <phoneme ph='l ou w r'>lower</phoneme> back, keep your knees lifted.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_UpwardDog_fromLowPlank_01
value: <anim name='upward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe in. <break size='2.0'/> Engage your core <break size='1.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_01
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Now <phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>. To Downward Facing Dog pose, curl your toes and send your hips toward the sky.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_01
value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Deep inhale. Hold here. <break size='0.5'/>Push the floor away, relax your neck<break size='0.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_01
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Deep <phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>. <break size='1.0'/> Bend your knees slightly if you need to <break size='1.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_01
value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe in.<break size='1.0'/> Focus on your breathing<break size='1.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_01
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe out<break size='4.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_01
value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale.<break size='1.5'/> Today you will flow through four sun salutations.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_01
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>. And close your practice in <phoneme ph='sh ah v aa s ah n ah'> savasana </phoneme> <break size='0.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_01
value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe in <break size='4.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_01
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe out<break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_HalfwayLift_fromDownwardDog_01
value: <anim name='halfway_lift_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale. Now back into Halfway Lift post, step your feet between your hands.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_HalfwayLift_fromDownwardDog_01
value: <anim name='halfway_lift_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe out <break size='4.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_HalfwayLift_fromDownwardDog_01
value: <anim name='halfway_lift_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe in <break size='3.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_ForwardBend_fromHalfwayLift_01
value: <anim name='forward_bend_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>And <phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>, back to Forward Fold pose<break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_ForwardBend_fromHalfwayLift_01
value: <anim name='forward_bend_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.9'>Inhale <break size='4.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_ForwardBend_fromHalfwayLift_01
value: <anim name='forward_bend_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.9'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme> <break size='3.5'/></pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_UpwardSalute_fromForwardBend_01
value: <anim name='upward_salute_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale, now back to Upward Salute pose, roll all the way up, draw your arms overhead<break size='0.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_UpwardSalute_fromForwardBend_01
value: <anim name='upward_salute_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme> <break size='4.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_UpwardSalute_fromForwardBend_01
value: <anim name='upward_salute_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe in <break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Prayer_fromUpwardSalute_01
value: <anim name='heart_center_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe out. Bring your palms together in front of your heart <break size='2.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Prayer_fromUpwardSalute_01
value: <anim name='heart_center_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale <break size='4.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Prayer_fromUpwardSalute_01
value: <anim name='heart_center_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme> <break size='3.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_UpwardSalute_fromPrayer_02
value: <anim name='upward_salute_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe in, into Upward Salute. <break size='1.0'/> Reach to the sun.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_ForwardBend_fromUpwardSalute_02
value: <anim name='forward_bend_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe out, to Forward Fold, bend your knees slightly <break size='1.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_HalfwayLift_fromForwardBend_02
value: <anim name='halfway_lift_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale, hands on your shins, to Halfway Lift <break size='1.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Plank_fromHalfwayLift_02
value: <anim name='plank_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>, plant your hands, step your feet back to plank. Spread your fingers wide <break size='0.3'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Plank_fromHalfwayLift_02
value: <anim name='plank_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale <break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_LowPlank_fromPlank_02
value: <anim name='low_plank_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>Exhale</phoneme>, bend at your elbows come down halfway to the ground, keep your elbows close to your body. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_UpwardDog_fromLowPlank_02
value: <anim name='upward_dog_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>And inhale to Upward Facing Dog. Flip onto the tops of your feet, broaden your collar bones.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_02
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>, to Downward Facing Dog. <break size='2.5'/></pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_02
value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Take in a breath. Imagine your body  the shape of a V, with energy from your hands and feet meeting in the middle.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_02
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>And breath out. Rotate your elbow creases toward the front <break size='1.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_02
value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale<break size='4.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_02
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.9'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>. Rotate your elbow creases, toward the front of the space <break size='1.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_02
value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.9'>Breathe in<break size='4.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_02
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe out<break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_HalfwayLift_fromDownwardDog_02
value: <anim name='halfway_lift_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale, step your feet up between your hands, to Halfway Lift.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_ForwardBend_HalfwayLift_02
value: <anim name='forward_bend_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>Exhale</phoneme>. Forward Fold <break size='2.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_UpwardSalute_fromForwardBend_02
value: <anim name='upward_salute_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale, rise up, reach your arms out and up. Upward Salute.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Prayer_fromUpwardSalute_02
value: <anim name='heart_center_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.9'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>, bring your palms together in front of your heart <break size='1.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_UpwardSalute_fromPrayer_03
value: <anim name='upward_salute_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.9'>Take in a breath, sweep your arms up, back to Upward Salute.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_ForwardBend_fromUpwardSalute_03
value: <anim name='forward_bend_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe out. Release down to Forward Fold.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_HalfwayLift_fromForwardBend_03
value: <anim name='halfway_lift_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale, hinge at the hips, to Halfway Lift.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Plank_fromHalfwayLift_03
value: <anim name='plank_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme> plant your hands, step back to Plank. Lift from your hips <break size='0.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Plank_fromHalfwayLift_03
value: <anim name='plank_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Take a big inhale <break size='1.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_LowPlank_fromPlank_03
value: <anim name='low_plank_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe out, <phoneme ph='l ou w r'>lower</phoneme> down halfway<break size='0.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_UpwardDog_fromLowPlank_03
value: <anim name='upward_dog_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale to Upward Facing Dog, knees lifted, chest open.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_03
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>. Hips to the sky, to Downward Facing Dog<break size='0.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_03
value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.9'> Breathe in <break size='2.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_03
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe out<break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_03
value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe in <break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_03
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>And breathe out<break size='2.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_HalfwayLift_fromDownwardDog_03
value: <anim name='halfway_lift_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale, step up between your hands to Halfway Lift, lengthen your spine.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_ForwardBend_fromHalfwayLift_03
value: <anim name='forward_bend_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>. Fold forward <break size='1.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_UpwardSalute_fromForwardBend_03
value: <anim name='upward_salute_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.9'>Inhale, arms sweep out and overhead. Upward Salute.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Prayer_fromUpwardSalute_03
value: <anim name='heart_center_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.9'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>, bring your hands to the heart <break size='1.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_UpwardSalute_fromPrayer_04
value: <anim name='upward_salute_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe in, arms up. To Upward Salute.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_ForwardBend_fromUpwardSalute_04
value: <anim name='forward_bend_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe out, down into Forward Fold. Connect to the earth.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_HalfwayLift_fromForwardBend_04
value: <anim name='halfway_lift_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale, lengthen your spine, into Halfway Lift.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Plank_fromHalfwayLift_04
value: <anim name='plank_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>, feet back, into Plank<break size='1.0'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Plank_fromHalfwayLift_04
value: <anim name='plank_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Take in a full breath <break size='2.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_LowPlank_fromPlank_04
value: <anim name='low_plank_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Then <phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>, <phoneme ph='l ou w r'>lower</phoneme> your body halfway down<break size='0.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_UpwardDog_fromLowPlank_04
value: <anim name='upward_dog_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe in, to Upward Facing Dog. <break size='0.5'/>Engage your core.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_04
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe out, to Downward Facing Dog. <break size='1.0'/></pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_04
value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.9'>Breathe in. Spread your fingers, push the floor away.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_04
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.9'>Breathe out<break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_04
value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.9'>Inhale <break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromUpwardDog_04
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.9'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme> <break size='2.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_HalfwayLift_fromDownwardDog_04
value: <anim name='halfway_lift_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale, step both feet between your hands. Halfway Lift.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_ForwardBend_fromHalfwayLift_04
value: <anim name='forward_bend_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>, down into Forward Fold <break size='1.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_UpwardSalute_fromForwardBend_04
value: <anim name='upward_salute_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe in, swing your arms up, come to standing, Upward Salute.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Prayer_fromUpwardSalute_04
value: <anim name='heart_center_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe out, and bring your hands back to your heart <break size='1.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Prayer_fromUpwardSalute_04
value: <anim name='heart_center_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Take a deep breath in<break size='2.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Prayer_fromUpwardSalute_04
value: <anim name='heart_center_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>And breathe out <break size='3.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_UpwardSalute_fromPrayer_05
value: <anim name='upward_salute_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale, arms up, Upward Salute <break size='0.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_ForwardBend_fromUpwardSalute_05
value: <anim name='forward_bend_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>, into Forward Fold <break size='1.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_HalfwayLift_fromForwardBend_05
value: <anim name='halfway_lift_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale, into Halfway Lift <break size='1.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromHalfwayLift_05
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> <phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme> to Downward Facing Dog. <break size='1.5'/></pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromHalfwayLift_05
value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Take a breath in <break size='2.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromHalfwayLift_05
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>And breathe out<break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromHalfwayLift_05
value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale deeply <break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_DownwardDog_fromHalfwayLift_05
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.9'>And <phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme> <break size='2.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Savasana_transitionIn
value: <duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Now, let's finish today, with a minute of <phoneme ph='sh ah v aa s ah n ah'> savasana </phoneme>.</pitch></duration>

name: SUN_Savasana_getOnGround
value: <anim name='light_ring_breathe_in_long'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Come down onto your knees. And bring yourself onto your back<break size='3.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Savasana_getOnGround
value: <anim name='light_ring_breathe_out_long'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>arms down by your sides, palms facing up. Stretch your legs out in front of you. <break size='2.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Savasana_closeEyes
value: <anim name='eye_ring_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Relax all your muscles, close your eyes <break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Savasana_closeEyes
value: <anim name='eye_ring_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Let go of your controlled breathing, just breathe naturally<break size='3.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Savasana_closeEyes
value: <anim name='eye_ring_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Let go of any thoughts about the past, present, or future<break size='2.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Savasana_silence
value: <anim name='eye_ring_exhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_inhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_exhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_inhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_exhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_inhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_exhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_inhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_exhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_inhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_exhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_inhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_exhale'/>

name: SUN_Savasana_transitionOut
value: <anim name='eye_ring_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Now, begin to deepen your breathing <break size='3.0'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Savasana_transitionOut
value: <anim name='eye_ring_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Start to wiggle your fingers, your toes. Your wrists. Your ankles <break size='2.0'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Savasana_transitionOut
value: <anim name='eye_ring_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Step your feet to the ground, knees towards the sky <break size='3.0'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Savasana_transitionOut
value: <anim name='eye_ring_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Roll on to your right side. Rest your head on your right arm <break size='2.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Savasana_transitionOut
value: <anim name='eye_ring_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><break size='4.0'/> Now roll up to a seated position.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Savasana_transitionOut
value: <anim name='eye_ring_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><break size='3.0'/> Bring your palms together in front of your heart <break size='2.0'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Savasana_transitionOut
value: <anim name='eye_ring_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Take in one final big breath<break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Savasana_transitionOut
value: <anim name='eye_ring_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>And breathe out. <break size='1.0'/> Let everything go <break size='3.0'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: SUN_Savasana_transitionOut
value: <anim name='body_bow' ><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><break size='0.5'/><phoneme ph='b au'> Bow </phoneme> your head in gratitude <break size='3.0'/>.</pitch></duration> </anim>

name: WAR_Introduction_beSeated
value: <duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Begin seated on the ground, in a comfortable position <break size='4.5'/>. Close your eyes.</pitch></duration>

name: WAR_Introduction_closeEyesBreathe
value: <anim name='eye_ring_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>And breathe out <break size='4.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Introduction_closeEyesBreathe
value: <anim name='eye_ring_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe in <break size='4.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

value: <anim name='eye_ring_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>And breathe out <break size='4.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

value: <anim name='eye_ring_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Exhale <break size='4.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Introduction_openEyes
value: <anim name='eye_opening' nonBlocking='true'/><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Now open your eyes and come to a standing position <break size='2.0'/>.</pitch></duration>

name: WAR_Introduction_standFront
value: <duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Stand at the front of your mat, with your feet parallel and hip distance apart.<break size='0.3'/><phoneme ph='r u u t'> Root </phoneme> down through your feet<break size='2.0'/>. </pitch></duration>

name: WAR_Prayer_fromIntroduction
value: <duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Bring your palms together in front of your heart<break size='3.0'/>.</pitch></duration>

name: WAR_Prayer_fromIntroduction
value: <anim name='heart_center_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Take a deep breath in, filling all the way up <break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Mountain_fromPrayer_01
value: <anim name='mountain_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Now <phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>. <break size='0.3'/> To release into Mountain Pose, let your arms down your sides, <phoneme ph='p aa m s'>palms</phoneme> facing front.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Mountain_fromPrayer_01
value: <anim name='mountain_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale. <break size='1.5'/> Release any tension in your shoulders<break size='1.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Mountain_fromPrayer_01
value: <anim name='mountain_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Exhale <break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_UpwardSalute_fromMountain_01
value: <anim name='upward_salute_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe in, sweep your arms up and over your head, into Upward Salute pose<break size='0.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_UpwardSalute_fromMountain_01
value: <anim name='mountain_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe out, bring your <phoneme ph='p aa m s'>palms</phoneme> to touch, or parallel your arms with <phoneme ph='p aa m s'>palms</phoneme> facing in.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_UpwardSalute_fromMountain_01
value: <anim name='upward_salute_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale <break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_ForwardBend_fromUpwardSalute_01
value: <anim name='forward_bend_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>, hinge at the hips, and <phoneme ph='s w o n'>swan</phoneme> dive into the Forward Fold pose, release your hands towards the ground. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_ForwardBend_fromUpwardSalute_01
value: <anim name='forward_bend_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Take a breath in. <break size='1.0'/> Bend your knees if you have to<break size='2.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_ForwardBend_fromUpwardSalute_01
value: <anim name='forward_bend_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.9'>And breathe out <break size='3.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Mountain_fromForwardBend_01
value: <anim name='mountain_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale, reverse swan dive, coming back up to stand, to return to Mountain pose<break size='0.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Mountain_fromForwardBend_01
value: <anim name='mountain_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Exhale <break size='4.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Mountain_fromForwardBend_01
value: <anim name='mountain_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe in <break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_WarriorTwoLeft_fromMountain_01
value: <anim name='warrior_two_left_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>. <break size='0.3'/> Now to Warrior 2 Pose, step your right foot back and turn your toes out 90 degrees.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_WarriorTwoLeft_fromMountain_01
value: <anim name='warrior_two_left_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Breathe out. Align your left heel with your right arch. Keep your right leg straight.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_WarriorTwoLeft_fromMountain_01
value: <anim name='warrior_two_left_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> <phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>, bend into your left leg so the knee is directly over the ankle, and extend both arms out straight<break size='0.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_WarriorTwoLeft_fromMountain_01
value: <anim name='warrior_two_left_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Breathe out, and look past your left fingertips <break size='2.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_WarriorTwoLeft_fromMountain_01
value: <anim name='warrior_two_left_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Breathe out. <break size='0.5'/> Relax your shoulders<break size='3.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_HighLungeLeft_fromWarriorTwoLeft_01
value: <anim name='high_lunge_left_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Now breathe in, to High Lunge Pose. Spin onto the ball of your right foot, as you rotate towards the front of the space.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_HighLungeLeft_fromWarriorTwoLeft_01
value: <anim name='high_lunge_left_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>, your left leg stays bent, knee directly over the ankle. Right leg extended. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_HighLungeLeft_fromWarriorTwoLeft_01
value: <anim name='high_lunge_left_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe in, lift your arms up overhead, palms facing toward each other. <break size='0.3'/> Engage your core for stability.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHighLungeLeft_01
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>And breathe out to Downward Facing Dog pose, planting your hands on the ground and stepping both feet back, sending your hips toward the sky.</pitch></duration></anim>

value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Deep inhale.<break size='0.5'/>Hold here. <break size='0.5'/>Push the floor away. Relax your neck.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHighLungeLeft_01
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Deep <phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>. <break size='2.0'/> Bend your knees slightly if you need to <break size='2.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHighLungeLeft_01
value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe in.<break size='1.0'/>Focus on your breathing <break size='2.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHighLungeLeft_01
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Breathe out <break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHighLungeLeft_01
value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Breathe in.<break size='0.5'/> Today you will flow through a basic warrior sequence four times.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHighLungeLeft_01
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Breathe out. And end with <phoneme ph='sh ah v aa s ah n ah'>savasana</phoneme>, to relax your mind and body <break size='2.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHighLungeLeft_01
value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale <break size='4.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHighLungeLeft_01
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme> <break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

value: <anim name='halfway_lift_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'>Now <pitch band='0.7'>inhale, bring yourself to Halfway Lift Pose, stepping your feet between your hands.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_HalfwayLift_fromDownwardDog_01
value: <anim name='halfway_lift_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Exhale, place your hands on your shins <break size='2.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_HalfwayLift_fromDownwardDog_01
value: <anim name='halfway_lift_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe in <break size='3.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

value: <anim name='forward_bend_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe out, down into Forward Fold pose <break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_ForwardBend_fromHalfwayLift_01
value: <anim name='forward_bend_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale <break size='4.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_ForwardBend_fromHalfwayLift_01
value: <anim name='forward_bend_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.9'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme> <break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_UpwardSalute_fromForwardBend_01
value: <anim name='upward_salute_inhale_comet'><anim name='upward_salute_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe in, lift all the way up, draw your arms overhead, back to Upward Salute<break size='0.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_UpwardSalute_fromForwardBend_01
value: <anim name='upward_salute_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe out<break size='4.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_UpwardSalute_fromForwardBend_01
value: <anim name='upward_salute_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale <break size='3.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Prayer_fromUpwardSalute_01
value: <anim name='heart_center_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>. Bring your palms together in front of your heart <break size='2.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Prayer_fromUpwardSalute_01
value: <anim name='heart_center_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Take in a breath<break size='4.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Prayer_fromUpwardSalute_01
value: <anim name='heart_center_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>And breathe out<break size='3.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_UpwardSalute_fromPrayer_02
value: <anim name='upward_salute_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale, into Upward Salute. <break size='1.0'/> Reach to the sun.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_ForwardBend_fromUpwardSalute_02
value: <anim name='forward_bend_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme> to Forward Fold, releasing your hands to the ground <break size='1.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Mountain_fromForwardBend_02
value: <anim name='mountain_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe in, roll yourself up to stand, to Mountain pose <break size='0.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_WarriorTwoRight_fromMountain_02
value: <anim name='warrior_two_right_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe out, to Warrior 2 Pose, this time step your left foot back and turn your toes out 90 degrees.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_WarriorTwoRight_fromMountain_02
value: <anim name='warrior_two_right_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Inhale, align your right heel with your left arch, keep your left leg straight.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_WarriorTwoRight_fromMountain_02
value: <anim name='warrior_two_right_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> <phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>. Bend into the right leg so the knee is directly over the ankle, extend both arms out straight. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_WarriorTwoRight_fromMountain_02
value: <anim name='warrior_two_left_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Breathe out, and look past your right fingertips <break size='2.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_WarriorTwoRight_fromMountain_02
value: <anim name='warrior_two_left_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Breathe out <break size='0.5'/>. Relax your shoulders<break size='3.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

value: <anim name='high_lunge_right_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale, to High Lunge. Spin onto the ball of your left foot as you rotate towards the front of the space.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_HighLungeRight_fromWarriorTwoRight_02
value: <anim name='high_lunge_right_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> <phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>, your right leg will stay bent, knee over the ankle, left leg extended. You can have a slight bend in the knee.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_HighLungeRight_fromWarriorTwoRight_02
value: <anim name='high_lunge_right_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Breathe in, lift your arms up overhead, palms toward each other. You can widen your stance for stability.</pitch></duration></anim>

value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme> to Downward Facing Dog. Plant your hands on the ground, step both feet back and send your hips toward the sky.</pitch></duration></anim>

value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'> <duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Deep inhale. <break size='0.5'/> Imagine your body the shape of a V, with energy from your hands and feet meeting in the middle<break size='0.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHighLungeRight_02
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> And <phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme> <break size='4.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHighLungeRight_02
value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Breathe in <break size='4.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHighLungeRight_02
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Breathe out. Bend your knees slightly if you need to <break size='1.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_HalfwayLift_fromDownwardDog_02
value: <anim name='halfway_lift_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale, step your feet up between your hands, to Halfway Lift.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_ForwardBend_HalfwayLift_02
value: <anim name='forward_bend_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>Exhale</phoneme>. Into Forward Fold <break size='2.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_UpwardSalute_fromForwardBend_02
value: <anim name='upward_salute_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale, rise up, reach your arms up and overhead. Upward Salute.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Prayer_fromUpwardSalute_02
value: <anim name='heart_center_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe out, bring your palms together in front of your heart <break size='1.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_UpwardSalute_fromPrayer_03
value: <anim name='upward_salute_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Take in a breath, sweep your arms up, back to Upward Salute.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_ForwardBend_fromUpwardSalute_03
value: <anim name='forward_bend_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>And <phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>. Forward Fold <break size='0.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Mountain_fromForwardBend_03
value: <anim name='mountain_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale, rise up to Mountain<break size='1.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_WarriorTwoLeft_fromMountain_03
value: <anim name='warrior_two_left_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>, back to Warrior Two Pose on the left, right foot back, toes out 90 degrees.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_WarriorTwoLeft_fromMountain_03
value: <anim name='warrior_two_left_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Breathe in, extend your arms out, gaze past your left fingertips.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_WarriorTwoLeft_fromMountain_03
value: <anim name='warrior_two_left_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Breathe out. Bend deeper into your left knee. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_HighLungeLeft_fromWarriorTwoLeft_03
value: <anim name='high_lunge_left_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale to High Lunge, spin onto your right toes as you bend into the left knee<break size='0.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_HighLungeLeft_fromWarriorTwoLeft_03
value: <anim name='high_lunge_left_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>. Lift your arms up overhead, fingers pointed to the sky.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_HighLungeLeft_fromWarriorTwoLeft_03
value: <anim name='high_lunge_left_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>And Inhale<break size='2.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHighLungeLeft_03
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>And <phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>, Downward Facing Dog. Hips to the sky <break size='0.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHighLungeLeft_03
value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Take in a breath <break size='3.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHighLungeLeft_03
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>And let it out<break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHighLungeLeft_03
value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Inhale <break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHighLungeLeft_03
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> <phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>Exhale</phoneme><break size='2.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_HalfwayLift_fromDownwardDog_03
value: <anim name='halfway_lift_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale step both feet between your hands to Halfway Lift, lengthen your spine.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_ForwardBend_fromHalfwayLift_03
value: <anim name='forward_bend_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>, fold forward <break size='1.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_UpwardSalute_fromForwardBend_03
value: <anim name='upward_salute_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe in, arms sweep out and overhead. Upward Salute.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Prayer_fromUpwardSalute_03
value: <anim name='heart_center_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>, bring your hands to heart center <break size='0.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_UpwardSalute_fromPrayer_04
value: <anim name='upward_salute_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale, arms toward the sky. To Upward Salute.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_ForwardBend_fromUpwardSalute_04
value: <anim name='forward_bend_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>. Forward Fold <break size='1.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Mountain_fromForwardBend_04
value: <anim name='mountain_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe in, come up to Mountain <break size='1.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_WarriorTwoRight_fromMountain_04
value: <anim name='warrior_two_right_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe out to Warrior 2 on the right, left foot back, toes out 90 degrees.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_WarriorTwoRight_fromMountain_04
value: <anim name='warrior_two_right_inhale'> <duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale. Extend your arms out, gaze past your right fingertips.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_WarriorTwoRight_fromMountain_04
value: <anim name='warrior_two_right_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Exhale. Bend deeper into your right knee <break size='0.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_HighLungeRight_fromWarriorTwoRight_04
value: <anim name='high_lunge_right_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale to High Lunge, spin onto your left toes as you bend into the left knee.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_HighLungeRight_fromWarriorTwoRight_04
value: <anim name='high_lunge_right_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Breathe out. Lift your arms up overhead, fingers pointed to the sky<break size='0.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_HighLungeRight_fromWarriorTwoRight_04
value: <anim name='high_lunge_right_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Breathe in <break size='2.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHighLungeRight_04
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe out, to Downward Facing Dog <break size='1.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHighLungeRight_04
value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Deep breath in. Spread your fingers, push the floor away.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHighLungeRight_04
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'> <duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Big breath out <break size='3.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHighLungeRight_04
value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Inhale <break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHighLungeRight_04
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> <phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme> <break size='2.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_HalfwayLift_fromDownwardDog_04
value: <anim name='halfway_lift_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale, step both feet between your hands, Halfway Lift.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_ForwardBend_HalfwayLift_04
value: <anim name='forward_bend_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>. Forward Fold <break size='1.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_UpwardSalute_fromForwardBend_04
value: <anim name='upward_salute_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe in, roll your way up to stand, sweep your arms overhead, Upward Salute.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Prayer_fromUpwardSalute_04
value: <anim name='heart_center_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Breathe out, bring your palms together in front of your heart.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_UpwardSalute_fromPrayer_05
value: <anim name='upward_salute_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale, bring your arms up, for Upward Salute <break size='0.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_ForwardBend_fromUpwardSalute_05
value: <anim name='forward_bend_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>, Forward Fold <break size='1.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_HalfwayLift_fromForwardBend_05
value: <anim name='halfway_lift_inhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Inhale, Halfway Lift <break size='1.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHalfwayLift_05
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale_comet'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> <phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme> this time right into Downward Facing Dog <break size='1.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHalfwayLift_05
value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Breathe in <break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHalfwayLift_05
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Breathe out <break size='3.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHalfwayLift_05
value: <anim name='downward_dog_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Inhale deeply <break size='3.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_DownwardDog_fromHalfwayLift_05
value: <anim name='downward_dog_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> And <phoneme ph='e k s h ei l'>exhale</phoneme>, let everything go <break size='4.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Savasana_transitionIn
value: <duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Let's finish today, with a minute of <phoneme ph='sh ah v aa s ah n ah'> savasana </phoneme>.</pitch></duration>

name: WAR_Savasana_getOnGround
value: <anim name='light_ring_breathe_in_long'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Drop your knees down to the ground. And slowly bring yourself on to your back. <break size='3.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Savasana_getOnGround
value: <anim name='light_ring_breathe_out_long'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Allow your arms to lay at your sides, palms facing up. Stretch your legs out in front of you. <break size='2.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Savasana_closeEyes
value: <anim name='eye_ring_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>release all tension as you relax all your muscles, close your eyes <break size='3.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Savasana_closeEyes
value: <anim name='eye_ring_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Let go of your controlled breathing, just breathe naturally<break size='3.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Savasana_closeEyes
value: <anim name='eye_ring_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Let go of any thoughts about the past, present, or future<break size='2.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Savasana_silence
value: <anim name='eye_ring_exhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_inhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_exhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_inhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_exhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_inhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_exhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_inhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_exhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_inhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_exhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_inhale'/><anim name='eye_ring_exhale'/>

name: WAR_Savasana_transitionOut
value: <anim name='eye_ring_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'> Now, begin to deepen your breath<break size='3.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Savasana_transitionOut
value: <anim name='eye_ring_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Start to wiggle your fingers, your toes. Your wrists. Your ankles <break size='2.0'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Savasana_transitionOut
value: <anim name='eye_ring_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Step your feet onto the ground <break size='3.5'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Savasana_transitionOut
value: <anim name='eye_ring_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Roll on to your right side. Rest your head on your right arm. <break size='1.0'/> Rest here for a moment <break size='3.0'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Savasana_transitionOut
value: <anim name='eye_ring_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><break size='4.0'/> Now slowly roll up to a comfortable seated position, keeping your eyes closed if you like.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Savasana_transitionOut
value: <anim name='eye_ring_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><break size='3.0'/> Bring your palms together in front of your heart <break size='2.0'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Savasana_transitionOut
value: <anim name='eye_ring_inhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>Take in one final big breath<break size='3.5'/>.</pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Savasana_transitionOut
value: <anim name='eye_ring_exhale'><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'>And let it go. <break size='4.0'/>. </pitch></duration></anim>

name: WAR_Savasana_transitionOut
value: <anim name='body_bow' ><duration stretch='1.1'><pitch band='0.7'><break size='0.5'/><phoneme ph='b au'> Bow </phoneme> your head in gratitude <break size='3.0'/>.</pitch></duration> </anim>
